checks.label: Review all transactions
checks.description: Verify all transactions for the month are recorded and categorized

checks.label: Verify categorization
checks.description: Ensure all expenses are assigned to the correct department and category

checks.label: Resolve flagged transactions
checks.description: Review and resolve any flagged or suspicious transactions

checks.label: Reconcile crypto wallets
checks.description: Match on-chain USDT transfers with recorded transactions

checks.label: Verify credit card statements
checks.description: Reconcile credit card charges with recorded expenses

checks.label: Department lead sign-off
checks.description: Obtain approval from each department lead on their spend

checks.label: Generate P&L statement
checks.description: Produce the monthly Profit & Loss statement

checks.label: Final approval
checks.description: CFO/CEO final sign-off on the month-end close
